blockers.description: Portainer auto-redeploy blocked by firewall (GitHub Actions IPs not whitelisted)
blockers.workaround: Manual PUT to https://194.242.35.77:9443/api/stacks/97?endpointId=3 with PullImage:true AND Env array — MUST include all 3 env vars or they get wiped. Also MUST include stackFileContent in PUT body (Portainer returns 'Invalid stack file content' otherwise). GET /api/stacks/97/file?endpointId=3 to retrieve current compose content first.

decisions.decision: Auth user created directly via SQL
decisions.rationale: No Supabase Admin UI access; GoTrue admin API returned errors

decisions.decision: postcss.config.mjs required for Tailwind v4 in production
decisions.rationale: next build uses Turbopack in Next.js 16; @tailwindcss/postcss installed

decisions.decision: Portainer PUT /api/stacks/{id} MUST include Env array
decisions.rationale: Empty Env array in PUT payload wipes all env vars from the stack — always pass all 3 vars
Portainer returns 'Invalid stack file content' if body lacks stackFileContent — GET /api/stacks/{id}/file first, then include in PUT

decisions.decision: Migrations applied via pg-meta API directly
decisions.rationale: No supabase_migrations schema on self-hosted instance; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ensures idempotency

decisions.decision: Statistics use CSS-only bars — no recharts
decisions.rationale: No external chart dependency for MVP; Tailwind CSS percentage bars sufficient for call volume visualization

decisions.decision: New users created via auth.admin.createUser with email_confirm:true
decisions.rationale: SMTP not configured on self-hosted Supabase; createUser bypasses email invite, admin shares tempPassword once

decisions.decision: No new DB tables for Phase 7
decisions.rationale: Statistics aggregate existing call_log/call_actions/inbox_items; user management uses existing user_tenant_roles (permissions JSONB column)

context_notes: Phase 7 complete. /statistiken and /benutzer live. STAT-01..05 and RBAC-01..06 all delivered. Phase 8: Audit Log & System Polish — 3 requirements (AUDIT-01..03). Last MVP phase.
